title: Tensura Reincarnated Re: Extended
description: A modpack that extends the fun and adventure of playing Tensura Reincarnated mod
body:
![Re:Extended logo in the style of camo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f29fb3bea2f833c09d13d97050ccec694ffd5eb8.png)
## <center> Tensura Reincarnated Re:Extended </center>

The Tensure Re:E modpack is modpack meant to make life playing the game more adventurist and extending the base mod with addons mods and other fun mods to explore in the game.

The modpack is built around Three core mods: Tensura, Ice & Fire, and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. While also containing other exploration base mods.

## <center> Need A Server? I Got You! </center>

With their extensive experience of over 10 years and presence in 20 global locations, you can count on them for an incredible gaming session. Their automated modpack installation and update system keep your server up-to-date, and their dedicated 24/7 support team is always there to help you with any game-related queries.
